generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst with 25 years of experience, I've seen firsthand how vital our alliances are for national security. The recent threats we're facing require collective strength. While some debate burden-sharing, the reality is that our alliances provide deterrence we can't achieve alone. We must maintain these commitments—not just for security, but for the stability that protects our civil liberties at home. The alternative is far more dangerous. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitments
